title: Angie
why_this_song: Angie by The Rolling Stones (1973) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 18 times; first heard in: "Angie, Angie"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "You can't say we're satisfied"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "But ain't it time we said goodbye?"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "I hate that sadness in your eyes"
Appears 2 times; first heard in: "When will those clouds all disappear?"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: When will those clouds all disappear?
Where will it lead us from here?
And no money in our coats
You can't say we never tried

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "angie" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "angie" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "can't" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "can't" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: When will those clouds all disappear?
Remember all those nights we cried?
Ain't it time we said goodbye, yeah?

exercises.prompt_en: The singer makes a claim or statement in this song. Do you agree with it? Use evidence from the lyrics to support your answer.
exercises.prompt_pt: O cantor faz uma afirmação nessa música. Você concorda? Use pelo menos um verso para defender sua resposta.

exercises.prompt_en: Which single word from this song do you think carries the most emotional weight, and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Qual palavra dessa música carrega mais peso emocional para você, e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: "Angie" was released in 1973. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "Angie" foi lançada em 1973. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
